top_signals.title: US Inflation Accelerates, Though Core Gauge Comes in Softer
top_signals.summary: US inflation accelerated again in May as the Iran war pushed up energy prices, though a gauge of underlying inflation rose by less than forecast.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Stocks Pare Losses After Tame Inflation Report: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: A relatively tame inflation report brought a degree of relief to Wall Street, with stocks paring losses on hopes that the Federal Reserve will hold off on raising interest rates this year.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: US inflation jumped to 4.2% in May amid Middle East energy shock
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: How tin went from baked beans to AI gravy train
top_signals.summary: Higher prices are prompting some miners to take up their shovels
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Public asked to help select UK wildlife to appear on new banknote series
top_signals.summary: The public are being asked to give their views on a selection of wildlife, native to the UK, that will appear on the next series of banknotes in a consultation launched today.

top_signals.title: Starmer dodges questions on funding for defence spending
top_signals.summary: Sir Keir Starmer dodged several questions over funding for an uplift in defence spending as he appeared to suggest that the full defence investment plan will take weeks to be published. Starmer refused to confirm the publication date for a 10-year blueprint on defence spending as he stuck to a commitment that it would be [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Samsung Heavy Enlists GTT for LNG Carrier Pair Tank Designs
top_signals.summary: GTT has secured an order from Samsung Heavy Industries shipyard for the tank design of two new liquefied natural gas (LNG) carriers, on behalf of a Greek ship-owner.GTT will design the cryogenic tanks of the vessels, each offering a total capacity of 174…
